ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component (e.g., C1, L1) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the component (e.g., 4.7pF, 13nH) */,
  "tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance of the component (e.g., ±0.25pF, ±5%) */,
  "pcb_decal" TEXT /* PCB decal size (e.g., 0402) */,
  "manufacturing_part_no" TEXT /* Manufacturing part number (e.g., GRM1555C1H4R7CZ01D) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the component */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the component was last updated */,
  "approved_vendor_list" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the component is approved for use */,
  "last_verified" TEXT /* Date and time the component was last verified */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Current verification status of the component */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the component's datasheet */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the component's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES component_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Capacitors) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* List of certifications held by the manufacturer */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being tracked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component in stock */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the component is stored */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last checked */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the component */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the component */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the components are stored */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the components */,
  "last_inventory_check" TEXT /* Date and time of the last inventory check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_inventory_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Warehouse A) */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the location is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current occupancy of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site (e.g., Main Factory) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the site */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site */,
  "production_capacity" INTEGER /* Production capacity of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., usage, reorder) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the transaction */,
  "transaction_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_transactions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, procurement manager, production supervisor) */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the user is located */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)
